home.heroSubtitle: — Discover what the cards tell you
home.heroBody: Unveil the cosmic architecture of your life through bespoke tarot readings designed for the modern seeker.
home.usp1Body: Each session is uniquely tailored to your current energetic alignment and personal narrative.
home.usp2Body: Over a decade of archival study in esoteric wisdom and traditional tarot symbology.
home.usp3Body: Connect from anywhere in the world via digital sanctum or visit our physical archive.
home.step1Body: Select a duration that resonates with your inquiry. Our calendar is synchronized with celestial transitions.
home.step2Body: We meet in a focused, meditative digital space to shuffle and lay the foundations of your spread.
home.step3Body: A detailed archival PDF of your reading, including card imagery and written interpretations for your records.
home.t1: "The depth of the reading was unlike anything I've experienced. A true archivist of the soul."
home.t2: "Elegance and accuracy combined. The insights on my career were life-changing."
home.t3: "Beautifully presented and profoundly resonant. I return for every major life transition."

book.title: Secure Your Astral Guidance
book.subtitle: Align your earthly intentions with the cosmic frequency. Enter the archive of your soul's blueprint and navigate the celestial tides.
book.step1Desc: Choose the ethereal path that calls to your current state of being.
book.focus1Desc: Navigating the currents of romance, soulmate connections, and emotional harmony.
book.focus2Desc: Clarifying your earthly purpose and unlocking the flow of universal prosperity.
book.focus3Desc: Confronting the shadow self to facilitate radical transformation and growth.
book.focus4Desc: Finding internal equilibrium and tuning into higher-dimensional frequencies.

howItWorks.label: The Sacred Methodology
howItWorks.title: The Alchemy of Archival Readings
howItWorks.subtitle: Beyond simple divination, our archival approach bridges the gap between ephemeral intuition and lasting wisdom.
howItWorks.step1Body: The ritual begins before we meet. You will receive a contemplative intake form designed to clarify your core inquiry. During this phase, we select a deck from our curated archival collection that resonates with your specific frequency.
howItWorks.step2Body: Our sessions take place via high-definition video link, staged within our physical sanctuary. This is not a transactional reading; it is a live dialogue.
howItWorks.step3Body: Within 48 hours, you receive your Archival PDF. This bespoke document is a high-editorial report containing professional studio photography of your spread.
howItWorks.archiveSubtitle: Preview the Artifacts of your journey
howItWorks.ctaBody: The Archive is open. Join us for a session that transcends time.

about.label: Introduction
about.title: The Keeper
about.subtitle: A bridge between the celestial and the cerebral, curating narratives hidden within the arcana for the modern seeker.
about.bio1: For over a decade, I have dedicated my life to the meticulous archival study of tarot symbology and esoteric philosophy. My journey didn't begin with a crystal ball, but in the dusty corners of forgotten libraries.
about.bio2: I approach the cards not as fortune-telling tools, but as a visual language of the collective unconscious. Through years of cross-referencing Jungian archetypes with medieval iconology, I've developed a methodology that treats each reading as an editorial curation of a soul's current chapter.
about.missionTitle: Bridging Ancient Mysticism with Contemporary Life
about.quote1: "wild.yet.sacred was founded on a singular realization: our modern world is rich in data but poor in meaning."
about.quote2: I created this space to serve as a sanctuary where the rigorous precision of an archivist meets the intuitive depth of the mystic.
about.cred1Body: Every reading is grounded in cross-historical references, from the Visconti-Sforza to contemporary psychological frameworks.
about.cred2Body: Receive a high-end, digital archival document detailing your session — a curated PDF 'editorial', not a simple list.
about.cred3Body: The focus is always on your story. We use the cards to find the narrative threads that empower your next decisive movement.
